_comment: Pinned relocatable Python runtime for the Sovereign AI Workstation .app (W5-4, E-6). Source: python-build-standalone (astral-sh) 'install_only' build — purpose-built for relocation + signing, unlike python.org's Python.framework. See docs/W5-4-PYTHON-BUNDLE-DESIGN.md. Bump: pick a release tag at https://github.com/astral-sh/python-build-standalone/releases, copy the macOS install_only sha256s from that release's SHA256SUMS.
